calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To And Request For Production Of Documents Interrogatories; For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Bank of the West's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted.

interrogatories
6, 9 - 11
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order. In addition, as the answers to interrogatories 9 - 11 reserve the right to amend the responses, the answers are ordered stricken. The response must be full and complete at the time it is made. If there is a need to amend, it must be made in compliance with CCP Section 2030.310.

Request for production of documents
Granted. Defendant shall produce responsive documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log.

The Court finds that defendant failed to respond to plaintiff's attempt to informally resolve the matters in dispute thus requiring the filing of the instant motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-12-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-31-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 502

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-22-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
